evals.expected_output: Skill loads Chrome tools, navigates all 4 TestFlight sections (crashes, feedback, builds, testers) for the Headwater app, deduplicates against existing beads issues, creates/updates issues with correct types and labels, and displays a structured summary table.
Skill processes only the crashes section, skips feedback/builds/testers, creates bug-type beads issues with crash labels and correct priority scaling, and reports section skips in the summary.

evals.prompt: check testflight for beta tester issues
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers without explicit /testflight-triage invocation, recognizes no app was specified, lists known apps from APP_MAP (headwater, swiftclaw), and asks the user to pick one before proceeding.
